# Highpressurehightemperaturetest

**Summary**: Testing of fluids under extreme pressure and temperature conditions to simulate deep well environments.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-elhag|ELHAG, 2014]] evaluated performance in drilling formulation at high pressure/high temperature (HPHT).
